Usage:
  circleci test run [path] [flags]

Examples:
# Run tests for the current directory
$ circleci test run

# Run tests for a specific project path
$ circleci test run ./my-app


Global Flags:
  -c, --config string   path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml)
      --debug           enable debug logging
  -q, --quiet           suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected
